role: Manifest management and persistence subsystem of the ArchSpine project, providing core logic for tracking file state, computing integrity hashes, and coordinating the lifecycle of the Spine manifest.
responsibility: The components in this directory collectively maintain the Spine manifest's runtime state and persistent storage. They handle file record creation, update, and deletion via the SpineDB; compute SHA-256 hashes of file content and metadata for drift detection; read and write JSON manifest and language snapshot files; manage the manifest lifecycle including baseline detection and sync decisions; and define the type contracts for file status snapshots used across scanning and synchronization layers.

children.role: Facade class that orchestrates file tracking, metadata management, and persistence operations over the SpineDB.
Infrastructure utility for computing file integrity hashes, used by the Spine gate to detect file changes.
Low-level synchronous I/O utility for reading JSON manifest files and computing canonical paths within the .spine directory. Provides a thin wrapper around fs and path for the manifest subsystem.
State persistence and lifecycle manager for the Spine manifest runtime state and language detection snapshots.
Protocol type definition defining the shape of a file status snapshot for use across the ArchSpine scanning and synchronization layers.
